1.english: The Way that can be spoken of is not the constant Way
The name that can be named is not the constant name
The nameless is the origin of heaven and earth
The named is the mother of the ten thousand things
Therefore, always without desire, one observes its mystery
Always with desire, one observes its manifestations
These two emerge together but differ in name
Together they are called the mystery

2.english: When all under heaven know beauty as beauty, ugliness arises
When all know goodness as goodness
Therefore being and non-being produce each other
Difficult and easy complement each other
Long and short define each other
High and low lean on each other
Tone and voice harmonize with each other
Before and after follow each other
Therefore the sage acts through non-action
And practices the teaching without words
The ten thousand things arise and he does not turn away from them
He gives life but does not possess
He acts but does not rely on his own ability
He accomplishes his task but does not claim credit
Because he does not claim credit, it does not leave him

3.english: So that the people will not compete
So that the people will not steal
Do not display objects of desire
So that the people's hearts will not be confused
Empties their minds and fills their bellies
Weakens their ambitions and strengthens their bones
Always keeps the people without cunning and without desire
Makes those with cleverness not dare to act
Act through non-action and nothing will be left ungoverned

4.english: The Way is empty yet in using it, it is never exhausted
Bottomless, it seems the ancestor of the ten thousand things
It blunts the sharp, unravels the tangled
It softens the glare and merges with the dust
Profound, it seems to barely exist
I do not know whose child it is
It seems to have existed before the Lord

5.english: Heaven and earth are not benevolent
They treat the ten thousand things as straw dogs
He treats the hundred families as straw dogs
The space between heaven and earth, is it not like a bellows?
Empty yet never exhausted, the more it moves the more it produces
Too many words lead to exhaustion
Better to hold to the center

6.english: It is called the mysterious female
The gate of the mysterious female
Is called the root of heaven and earth
Gossamer and subtle, it seems to endure
Use it and it is never exhausted

7.english: Heaven is eternal and earth is enduring
The reason heaven and earth can be long-lasting
Is because they do not live for themselves

7.chinese: 是以聖人後其身而身先
7.english: Therefore the sage puts himself last and finds himself first
He disregards himself and his self is preserved
Is it not because he is selfless?
Therefore he can fulfill his own self

8.english: The highest goodness is like water
Water benefits the ten thousand things and does not compete
It settles in places that people disdain
Therefore it is close to the Way
In dwelling, be close to the land; in thought, go deep
In relationships, be kind; in speech, be truthful
In governing, be just; in work, be competent
Because he does not compete, there is no blame

9.english: Hold a cup and overfill it
And it will spill; better to stop in time
Temper a blade to its sharpest
And it will not last long
When gold and jade fill the hall
When the work is done, withdraw
This is the Way of heaven

10.english: Carrying body and soul, embracing the one
Can you keep them from separating?
Concentrating your breath until it is soft
Can you become like an infant?
Can you make it without flaw?
Loving the people and governing the state
Can you do so through non-action?
As the gates of heaven open and close
Can you play the role of the female?
Can you do so without knowledge?
Give life but do not possess
Act but do not take credit
This is called the mysterious virtue
